'''鈭歵-k-ch-m''' ('''katakchemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadset|wadset]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-ch-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadset|wadset]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-k-ch-m
|-
! Lemma
| katakchemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakchemoko|thitakchemoko]] || [[word:jitakchemoko|jitakchemoko]] || [[word:shitakchemoko|shitakchemoko]] || [[word:kitakchemoko|kitakchemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutakchemoko|thuthutakchemoko]] || [[word:jujutakchemoko|jujutakchemoko]] || [[word:shushutakchemoko|shushutakchemoko]] || [[word:kukutakchemoko|kukutakchemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotakchemoko|thotakchemoko]] || [[word:jotakchemoko|jotakchemoko]] || [[word:shotakchemoko|shotakchemoko]] || [[word:kotakchemoko|kotakchemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙takchemoko|th忙takchemoko]] || [[word:j忙takchemoko|j忙takchemoko]] || [[word:sh忙takchemoko|sh忙takchemoko]] || [[word:k忙takchemoko|k忙takchemoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatakchemoko|thatakchemoko]] || [[word:jatakchemoko|jatakchemoko]] || [[word:shatakchemoko|shatakchemoko]] || [[word:katakchemoko|katakchemoko]]
|}
